title: Study Packages
description: A Study Package bundles multiple related analyses (characterization, incidence rates, estimation, prediction) into a single unit that can be executed together and tracked as a research project. Use studies to organise multi-analysis research protocols.
tips: Add all analyses for a research question to one study to keep results organised.
Execute All runs all analyses in the study sequentially in the background.
Study progress is tracked per-analysis — you can re-run individual failed analyses without restarting others.
Export the full study as a JSON bundle to reproduce or share the analysis protocol.
Studies map directly to OHDSI study packages — use them for network study coordination.
